title: How to use Sponge of Virtuoso actually? Could anybody show me a vivid example?
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE testGraph (s String, p String, o String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY s;
SELECT s, p, o FROM testGraph WHERE startsWith(o, 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/');
SELECT property, object FROM remote('https://query.wikidata.org', 'SELECT ?property ?object WHERE { <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q582093> ?property ?object . } LIMIT 100') AS wikidata;
ALTER TABLE testGraph DELETE WHERE s = 'http://example.org/item1';
key_bug_features: No data retrieved from Wikidata using SPARQL query
